assumptions: Spec sources are authoritative over current code

tasks.description: Resolve dependency/runtime incompatibilities causing Clerk and React startup failures.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run dev starts without import/export compatibility errors
Root route renders without internal server error
React and react-dom versions are pinned and matched
tasks.technicalApproach: Pin a known-good compatibility matrix for Next, Clerk, React, and related packages; reinstall and validate runtime.
tasks.validationMethod: Run dev server smoke test and capture browser snapshot for /, /sign-in, and /dashboard redirect behavior.
tasks.risksBlockers: May require controlled package downgrades and lockfile regeneration.

tasks.description: Restore deterministic quality gates for lint/build/test with clear pass/fail outputs.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run lint exits successfully
npm run build exits successfully
npm run test:run exits with deterministic result
tasks.technicalApproach: Fix toolchain invocation issues, remove hanging behavior, and normalize scripts for CI use.
tasks.validationMethod: Run all scripts twice and compare output consistency.
tasks.risksBlockers: Existing flaky tests may still fail after command stabilization.

tasks.description: Enforce appraisal ownership checks on comparables CRUD/search routes.
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH/DELETE comparables rejects non-owner access with 403
Comparable search insert validates appraisal ownership before insert
Authorization tests cover owner and non-owner paths
tasks.technicalApproach: Join comparables to appraisals by appraisalId and verify userId against authenticated principal before mutation.
tasks.validationMethod: Unit/integration tests for authz matrix on comparables endpoints.
tasks.risksBlockers: May require query refactors for efficient ownership checks.

tasks.description: Enforce ownership and linkage checks for document upload/delete flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload route validates appraisal ownership from authenticated user
Delete route validates document belongs to user appraisal before blob delete
Unauthorized requests are rejected with 403
tasks.technicalApproach: Store document metadata with appraisal binding and verify binding for all destructive operations.
tasks.validationMethod: Integration tests with owner and cross-tenant scenarios.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires introducing persistent document metadata if absent.

tasks.description: Remove mass-assignment risk from appraisal update and autosave APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Only allowlisted fields can be persisted
Unknown fields are rejected with 400
Schema validation errors return structured details
tasks.technicalApproach: Define strict Zod DTOs for patch payloads and map to DB columns explicitly.
tasks.validationMethod: API tests for valid patch, invalid key, and nested payload edge cases.
tasks.risksBlockers: Frontend may rely on permissive payload behavior and require updates.

tasks.description: Implement private blob storage and signed URL issuance for documents/reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Blob uploads are private by default
Signed URLs expire and are not reusable after expiry
Public URL access to private files is blocked
tasks.technicalApproach: Use provider private access mode and create server-only signed URL endpoints with expiry claims.
tasks.validationMethod: Security tests for expired token access and unauthorized direct URL access.
tasks.risksBlockers: Storage provider signed URL API differences across environments.

tasks.description: Replace base64 share token with cryptographically signed share links and verification endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Share token includes signature and expiry
Tampered tokens are rejected
Expired links return 410 or equivalent
tasks.technicalApproach: Use HMAC/JWT with server secret and explicit claims for appraisalId and expiry.
tasks.validationMethod: Unit tests for token generation/verification and tamper detection.
tasks.risksBlockers: Needs clear revocation policy for already-issued links.

tasks.description: Align individual report checkout price to required $129.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout line item amount equals 12900 cents
UI labels show $129 consistently
Payment tests validate expected amount
tasks.technicalApproach: Centralize price constants and consume from both API and UI.
tasks.validationMethod: Checkout session creation test asserts unit amount.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires Stripe product/price sync in dashboard.

tasks.description: Align subscription checkout plans to individual/professional/attorney/body_shop model.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout API accepts spec-defined plan identifiers
Price IDs map to all four required plans
Entitlements and metadata reflect selected role plan
tasks.technicalApproach: Define canonical plan enum and enforce usage across API, payment service, and env names.
tasks.validationMethod: Automated API tests for each plan type and invalid plan rejection.
tasks.risksBlockers: Potential migration required for existing subscription metadata.

tasks.description: Implement Stripe webhook fulfillment, idempotency, and post-payment triggers.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook events are idempotent
Completed appraisal payment triggers report generation workflow
Failure events produce retry-safe status transitions and notifications
tasks.technicalApproach: Store processed event ids, gate side effects, and separate event handler functions by type.
tasks.validationMethod: Webhook replay tests and sandbox Stripe event simulation.
tasks.risksBlockers: Needs durable idempotency storage.

tasks.description: Add missing indexes and generate checked-in migrations for schema parity.
acceptanceCriteria: Indexes exist for appraisals.user_id, appraisals.status, comparable_vehicles.appraisal_id
drizzle migration files are generated and committed
Schema can be reproduced from clean database
tasks.technicalApproach: Declare indexes in schema, generate migration SQL, verify execution in Neon test database.
tasks.validationMethod: Run migration on empty DB and inspect query plans.
tasks.risksBlockers: May require downtime plan if schema changes are non-trivial.

tasks.description: Create deterministic seed scripts for local/test environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed command populates representative users, appraisals, and comparables
Seed is idempotent or has reset mode
Tests can run against seeded fixture data
tasks.technicalApproach: Implement scripted inserts with stable IDs and role distributions.
tasks.validationMethod: Run seed twice and verify expected counts.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires agreement on canonical fixture set.

tasks.description: Create CI gate pipeline for lint/build/test/authz smoke before merge.
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs lint, typecheck/build, and tests on PR
Pipeline blocks merge on failures
Security smoke checks include authz regression tests
tasks.technicalApproach: Use staged jobs and cache dependencies; include minimal service setup for tests.
tasks.validationMethod: Open sample PR and verify status checks trigger and enforce policy.
tasks.risksBlockers: Repo may not yet have stable test runtime for all suites.

tasks.description: Fix onboarding role update flow to use authenticated application API, not webhook endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding submits to a dedicated authenticated role-update route
Webhook route remains external provider-only
Role selection persists and redirects correctly
tasks.technicalApproach: Add secure role update API using authenticated user identity and allowlisted role set.
tasks.validationMethod: Manual onboarding flow + API integration tests.
tasks.risksBlockers: Needs role update policy decision for existing users.

tasks.description: Normalize wizard routing paths to dashboard namespace and remove broken VIN-based edit links.
acceptanceCriteria: All wizard next/back/edit routes resolve under /dashboard/appraisals/:id
No route navigation uses VIN as appraisal identifier
Step transitions are stable for steps 1-8
tasks.technicalApproach: Introduce route helper util and consume it in all wizard components.
tasks.validationMethod: Browser automation through full step navigation path.
tasks.risksBlockers: Deep-linking bookmarks may require redirect compatibility.

tasks.description: Wire wizard step inputs to centralized state and autosave contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Steps 1-3 form inputs are controlled and persist values
Autosave sends synchronized payload matching API schema
Draft resume restores all previously entered data
tasks.technicalApproach: Implement typed wizard store with explicit field update handlers and debounced autosave.
tasks.validationMethod: Component tests + browser flow with refresh mid-wizard.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires coordinated payload schema with backend.

tasks.description: Fix Step 4 document extraction request contract and merge behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend sends documentUrl and documentType expected by extraction API
Extracted fields map correctly into wizard data model
Extraction errors render user-visible non-blocking feedback
tasks.technicalApproach: Introduce typed extraction payload/result interfaces and mapping adapters.
tasks.validationMethod: Integration test with mocked extraction responses and manual UI verification.
tasks.risksBlockers: Dependent on final extraction schema decisions.

tasks.description: Upgrade AI client to required Gemini 3.1 Pro model and align prompt contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Model identifier matches spec requirement
Extraction routes use updated client
Regression tests pass on representative sample payloads
tasks.technicalApproach: Centralize model constant and route all AI extraction calls through shared wrapper.
tasks.validationMethod: Mocked and live smoke calls with schema parsing checks.
tasks.risksBlockers: Model availability/quotas may vary per environment.

tasks.description: Replace placeholder Apify actor and implement resilient comparable search mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: Apify actor id is configurable and documented
Search returns normalized comparable objects for both comp types
Failures trigger retry/backoff and meaningful API errors
tasks.technicalApproach: Implement provider adapter with input/output validation and fallback behavior.
tasks.validationMethod: API integration tests with mocked Apify and one live sandbox run.
tasks.risksBlockers: External provider rate limits and schema drift.

tasks.description: Complete valuation logic for pre-accident grade handling and dvPercentOfRepair computation.
acceptanceCriteria: Pre-accident condition uses actual subject data
dvPercentOfRepair is computed from repair totals
Calculation tests cover edge cases and expected formulas
tasks.technicalApproach: Pass full input model into valuation function and compute all returned metrics deterministically.
tasks.validationMethod: Unit tests and API response schema validation.
tasks.risksBlockers: Need agreement on formula behavior when repair cost is zero.

tasks.description: Implement full 15-25 page appraisal report generation with required section structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Report includes all required sections from master schema
Generated PDF is multi-page with professional formatting and pagination
Role-specific USPAP sections render only when applicable
tasks.technicalApproach: Build report assembler model then render section components in deterministic order with page breaks.
tasks.validationMethod: PDF structure test (page count, section markers) and visual review snapshots.
tasks.risksBlockers: Large rendering payloads may require performance tuning.

tasks.description: Harden report preview/download/share flows on private storage model.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview uses signed URL retrieval endpoint
Download works for entitled user only
Share links are secure and expire correctly
tasks.technicalApproach: Expose explicit report access API with authz + expiry semantics.
tasks.validationMethod: Browser tests for owner/non-owner and expired-link scenarios.
tasks.risksBlockers: Signed URL generation cost or latency.

tasks.description: Implement full document template engine and all 7 required templates.
acceptanceCriteria: All required templates are generated with variable substitution
No unresolved {{variable}} placeholders remain in output
Template generation APIs return expected content and metadata
tasks.technicalApproach: Create central renderer and typed template data contracts reused by all template modules.
tasks.validationMethod: Template snapshot tests and placeholder-completion assertions.
tasks.risksBlockers: Legal copy approval required for some templates.

tasks.description: Implement expert witness affidavit generation endpoint with appraiser gating.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint only available to professional appraiser role
Affidavit includes USPAP statements and appraiser credentials
Output format supports PDF or DOCX as required
tasks.technicalApproach: Use shared template engine with role guard and validation of appraiser credentials.
tasks.validationMethod: Role-based API tests and generated-document snapshot validation.
tasks.risksBlockers: Credential completeness rules may require product decision.

tasks.description: Complete document library and template pages currently marked as coming soon.
acceptanceCriteria: Documents page lists uploaded files with actions
Templates page lists available template types and generation actions
Navigation from appraisal details works end-to-end
tasks.technicalApproach: Connect existing APIs and render grouped content with empty/error states.
tasks.validationMethod: Browser automation of document/template workflow.
tasks.risksBlockers: Depends on completed backend template endpoints.

tasks.description: Wire email delivery trigger points for purchase completion and report generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment success triggers report-ready email when report available
Manual email send route validates recipient and report ownership
Send failure is retriable and logged
tasks.technicalApproach: Implement asynchronous email job trigger with idempotency key.
tasks.validationMethod: Integration test with mocked SendGrid transport.
tasks.risksBlockers: Email domain verification and provider quotas.

tasks.description: Implement attorney team management backend and functional dashboard UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Attorneys can invite/list/remove team members
Paralegal permissions are role-scoped
Team actions are audited
tasks.technicalApproach: Add team membership tables and permission middleware integration.
tasks.validationMethod: Role-based integration tests and browser invitation flow.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires invite email flow and acceptance UX.

tasks.description: Build educational resources and negotiation guidance module per requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Topic-organized educational library is accessible from dashboard/resources
Includes 17c explanation, NAAA guidance, negotiation scripts
State-specific guidance blocks are rendered
tasks.technicalApproach: Add content model and role-targeted presentation components.
tasks.validationMethod: Content completeness checklist + UI smoke tests.
tasks.risksBlockers: Content/legal review lead time.

tasks.description: Complete role-gated UI/feature exposure including body shop white-label options.
acceptanceCriteria: Role-specific controls are hidden or shown correctly
Body shop white-label configuration panel is functional
Unauthorized feature access attempts are blocked server-side
tasks.technicalApproach: Use shared permission helper for both server and client guard conditions.
tasks.validationMethod: Role matrix tests and browser role-switch smoke flows.
tasks.risksBlockers: Feature flag strategy may be needed.

tasks.description: Execute responsive design hardening for 320px-2560px across critical pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Wizard is usable at 320px viewport
Dashboard tables/actions are mobile-usable
Preview and template pages render without overlap/truncation
tasks.technicalApproach: Add responsive breakpoints and mobile-first layout adjustments.
tasks.validationMethod: Playwright viewport matrix snapshots.
tasks.risksBlockers: Complex table interaction patterns on mobile.

tasks.description: Deliver accessibility compliance baseline (semantic structure, labels, keyboard, ARIA).
acceptanceCriteria: All form inputs have associated labels
Keyboard navigation works for all interactive controls
Automated accessibility scan reports no critical violations
tasks.technicalApproach: Apply semantic HTML fixes, replace alert dialogs, and add ARIA for complex widgets.
tasks.validationMethod: axe-core scan and manual keyboard traversal checklist.
tasks.risksBlockers: Legacy component patterns may need refactors.

tasks.description: Refactor test suite to align with production contracts and stable fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Auth tests reflect actual requireAuth API
Template tests exercise production template engine
Database tests use deterministic fixture lifecycle
tasks.technicalApproach: Remove mock-only contract drift and create dedicated test helpers for auth/database setup.
tasks.validationMethod: Run full test suite and ensure repeatability over multiple runs.
tasks.risksBlockers: Potentially significant rewrite scope.

tasks.description: Implement Playwright E2E suite for critical user journeys and payment/report flows.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E covers onboarding, wizard, calculation, payment, report access
Tests run headless in CI
Artifacts include screenshots/video for failed steps
tasks.technicalApproach: Use seeded test accounts and deterministic fixtures; mock external providers where needed.
tasks.validationMethod: CI execution with reproducible pass baseline.
tasks.risksBlockers: External payment/auth providers may require sandbox orchestration.

tasks.description: Optimize query paths, bulk operations, and report generation latency.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard and wizard APIs meet response-time targets
Comparable search and report generation respect SLA thresholds
Bulk download pipeline supports concurrent fetch strategy
tasks.technicalApproach: Profile hotspots, add batching/concurrency controls, and exploit DB indexes.
tasks.validationMethod: Load-test scripts and endpoint latency benchmarks.
tasks.risksBlockers: PDF generation complexity may require asynchronous job queue.

tasks.description: Implement security audit logging and server-side rate limiting for API routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Sensitive actions are logged with user and resource ids
Rate limiting is enforced on write-heavy endpoints
Security events are queryable for incident response
tasks.technicalApproach: Add middleware-level limiter and structured security log utility with redaction.
tasks.validationMethod: Abuse-case tests for throttling and log verification.
tasks.risksBlockers: Distributed rate limiting may need shared storage.

tasks.description: Publish launch runbook, operational checklist, and rollback procedures.
acceptanceCriteria: Pre-launch checklist includes security/performance/test gates
Rollback procedure is executable and tested
On-call and incident response contacts/escalation paths are documented
tasks.technicalApproach: Document concrete command sequences, decision gates, and ownership responsibilities.
tasks.validationMethod: Tabletop dry run with handoff validation.
tasks.risksBlockers: Requires final infra/service ownership decisions.
